nodes.name: 麻雀科
nodes.summary: 麻雀科是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联17种鸟类，包括White-browed sparrow-weaver、斑文鳥、Pale rockfinch等17种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Shelley's sparrow
nodes.summary: Shelley's sparrow（Shelley's sparrow，学名 Passer shelleyi），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 默奇森瀑布國家公園
nodes.summary: 默奇森瀑布國家公園是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Shelley's sparrow，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: George Ernest Shelley
nodes.summary: George Ernest Shelley是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括Somali courser、Sandy scops owl、Lilian's lovebird等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|A detail of an illustration by Henrik Grönvold, showing a male Shelley's sparrow Shelley's sparrow (Passer shelleyi), also known as Shelley's rufous sparrow or the White Nile rufous sparrow, is a sparrow found in eastern Africa from South Sudan, southern Ethiopia, and north-western Somalia to northern Uganda and north-western Kenya. Formerly, it was considered as a subspecies of the Kenya sparrow. This species is named after English geologist and ornithologist George Ernest Shelley

Formerly, it was considered as a subspecies of the Kenya sparrow. This species is named after English geologist and ornithologist George Ernest Shelley
